notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the thunderbird SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 61 CVEs: CVE-2023-50761, CVE-2023-50762, CVE-2023-5388, CVE-2023-6204, CVE-2023-6205, and 56 more.
